title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: A memory-first AI agent that remembers why decisions were made — not just the last message. Runs local (Ollama), cloud (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini), or decentralized TEE. Graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools. MCP · ACP · A2A. One Rust binary.

title: ckoenig673/recipe-clipper
summary: A self-hosted recipe manager with AI-powered imports, OCR, social media recipe extraction, meal planning, grocery lists, and cookbook organization.

title: foolish-dev/teleia
summary: τέλεια — minimal TUI coding agent. Streams chat over Ollama / Anthropic / OpenAI, runs read/write/edit/bash, persists sessions to SQLite.  (Rewritten in Rust btw)

title: ricardozmt/claude-in-your-pocket
summary: OpenClaude 2026: AI Coding Agent in Your Pocket – No Server, No PC

title: Useless772/whisper-releases
summary: Whisper - суфлер для рабочих звонков. Распознает речь собеседника и выводит подсказку в окне поверх остальных.

title: nodetool-ai/nodetool
summary: The open creative AI workspace

title: loblawbob873-svg/posterchanai
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant & bot platform — streaming chat with local or cloud LLMs (Ollama/llama.cpp/IPEX-LLM for Intel Arc), image generation, TTS/STT, RAG + MCP, and autonomous Telegram, Matrix, Misskey & Pleroma bots. FastAPI +   SQLite, single-admin multi-user.

title: rohithkandula19/Ronin
summary: Masterless, terminal-native coding agent (Claude Code-style: reads, edits, runs code) for Claude, Gemini, Cerebras, Groq, and Ollama. Provider-agnostic with evals, memory, security hardening, 200+ plugins, and MCP. MIT.

title: Tamaz-sujashvili/senior-code-mcp
summary: MCP server giving coding agents local semantic + structural memory of a codebase (Qdrant vectors + NetworkX call/import graph, Python ast). Agents reuse proven patterns instead of guessing — saves tokens, raises code quality. Fully local; self-onboards via AGENTS.md.

title: RunAnyDev/runany
summary: Open-source Astro MDX tech blog for AI setup guides, local LLMs, Ollama, developer tools, self-hosted tutorials, and automation workflows

title: Rahulsanecdote/Forge
summary: Self-hostable, provider-agnostic agent runtime with a typed tool system and per-client context isolation. Runs fully offline against Ollama. MIT.

title: georgejieh/REED
summary: Self-hosted AI agent that researches US market news on a schedule and publishes structured briefs to a terminal-style dashboard. Bring your own LLM.

title: om-chauahan/document-summarization-system
summary: AI-powered Document Summarization System using Django, React, Ollama LLM, OCR, and SQLite.

title: LucidPrinciples/lucid-cove
summary: A private, self-hosted home for your family and its intelligence. Named agents with memory and daily practice — your data, your models, your machine.

title: wlsdks/muse-agent
summary: An AI you live with, not one you visit. A little bluebird settles into your computer — keeps your unfinished threads, learns your rhythms, and gets better at helping the longer you're together. Local-first: your life stays on your machine.

title: hysel/haven-42
summary: Haven 42 is an evidence-gated, local-first AI workbench for coding, chat, and media on Windows, Linux, and macOS.

title: Sina-Amare/promptamp
summary: ⚡ The prompt amplifier — open-source BYOK prompt enhancer for any input field on any site. Chrome · Firefox · Edge

title: debasish3807-afk/sona-ai-os
summary: Production-Ready Personal AI Operating System with Multi-Agent Intelligence, Memory, RAG, MCP Tools and Cloud AI Providers.

title: pdbethke/corralai
summary: One directive → a herd of AI agents that plan, build, verify, and re-plan across any model (local 7B to frontier) — human-gated, jail→repo, with shared memory + skills. Every mission recorded and replayable.
